title: OncoRNALab/totalexRNAseq: Total RNA sequencing data processing of extracellular RNA from biofluids
author: Decock, Anneleen
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This release accompanies the lab protocol: "Total RNA sequencing of extracellular RNA from biofluids" (Decock  et al. ,  STAR Protocols , 2026). It provides a complete Snakemake workflow for processing both single-end and paired-end extracellular RNA sequencing data in a fully reproducible containerized environment. 
 Please refer to the README.md for instructions on how to run the pipeline. For questions or issues, feel free to open an issue in this repository.
steps_raw:
This release accompanies the lab protocol: "Total RNA sequencing of extracellular RNA from biofluids" (Decock  et al. ,  STAR Protocols , 2026). It provides a complete Snakemake workflow for processing both single-end and paired-end extracellular RNA sequencing data in a fully reproducible containerized environment. 
 Please refer to the README.md for instructions on how to run the pipeline. For questions or issues, feel free to open an issue in this repository.
